title: Collision and Physics Challenge
genericDescription: Use collision layers and triggers; distinguish physics simulation from authored movement; debug spatial interactions.
specificDescription: Build a game where the main challenge depends on collision, bounce, sliding, pushing, or gravity. Include a debug visualization toggle for collision bounds, velocity, or contact state.
gradingRubric: 30 pts correct collision behavior; 20 pts physics-based level design; 20 pts debug visualization; 15 pts feel and tuning; 15 pts code notes.
